message:
🐛 fix(security): bump postcss 8.5.8→8.5.10 (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93) (#9966)

PostCSS <8.5.10 has an XSS vulnerability via unescaped </style> in its
CSS stringify output. Scorecard alert #16 flags this as a dependency risk.

uuid/netlify-blobs transitive vuln (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq) has no safe
fix path available (fix requires breaking downgrade of @netlify/blobs
from 10.x to 8.x) and is retained as-is.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
